creator: pete@peteb.org.uk
text:
Not sure if this is how to report more information but I also have a HP
Proliant Microserver running Arch. It has been stable for a couple of
months. Re-booted the box this evening and I am now getting this error which
is stopping the system booting. I am also receiving the following error
above it

 

'Address Space collision: host bridge window conflicts with ROM'

 

Any assistance you could offer will be gratefully received

 

Thanks

 

Pete
